roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X  AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THEPEOPLE MOVE TO DISMISS THIS CASE PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/CTORD:ACM IS RELIEVED/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OROTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BEADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO,20011861,/EMTERM/

/CAL:COURT'S MOTION TO ADVANCE COURT DATE/INTC/ACM/WS/SA2:AREA BOUNDED BY GEARY BLVD, MCALLISTER ST, LARKIN ST & JONES ST, SF CA/SAORD3/SAORD/X:ASA CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ANDIS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORDAND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/VD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 12-29-20 (60TH)/SA2: 600 BLOCK OF EDDY ST, SF, CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 90 MINUTES/DOP/
